ideasAndImprovements.description: 5 days of same blockers suggests we need pre-auth for time-sensitive items. Example: 'If ALTERNATE YouTube is ready by Wednesday, launch without asking.' Gives agents autonomy with guardrails.
Auto-detect payment failures within 24h instead of catching them 5-9 days late. Wise API already connected — add daily payment health check to STATE.json.
After 72h with same blocker, auto-escalate with solutions: 'Blocker X is 3 days old. Options: (A) pre-auth me, (B) delegate to someone else, (C) kill the task.'
The website refresh plan is comprehensive. Once executed, use Junction rebrand as case study for future Clawdbot service clients.
We've now missed Valentine's Day, Weekend Premiere, Presidents Day, and two Tuesday windows. Document what made these good windows so next creative project has launch timing playbook.
